name: teio-context
description: Load and persist a project's shared context in your Claude Code session — /teio-context:teio-start and /teio-context:teio-complete, backed by the teio-context MCP server.

api_token.title: teio-context personal token
api_token.description: Generate at teio-context.vercel.app → Settings → Personal access token (starts with tctx_).

api_url.title: teio-context API URL
api_url.description: Leave as the default unless you self-host.
